content.title: Mike and the Harmonics
content.details:
That 80’s Show, live at Triggerfish Brewing!

Mike and the Harmonix – Hits of the 80s Show

Mike McCully from McCully Workshop has put together another hit show… Hits of the 80s.

Featuring Mike himself on drums and vocals, the show has all the elements of Mike's shows… audience participation, fun, amazing artists, and great music.

Sjanel Vosloo and Kea Brand on lead vocals bring back memories with songs like Flashdance, Sweet Dreams (Are Made of This), I Want to Break Free, Don't Stop Believing, and many more.

Also featuring fellow McCully member Gordon Mackay on lead vocals with songs by Bruce Springsteen, Billy Joel, Dire Straits, among others.

Lead guitarist Warren Lomberg and bassist Neil Peyten complete the lineup, which will have patrons dancing in the aisles to more hits by ABBA, Guns N’ Roses, AC/DC, Tina Turner, Fleetwood Mac, and more.

For an amazing night of fun, party, and excellent music… Mike and the Harmonix – Hits of the 80s is not to be missed.

What the critics said…

"80s at its best!" — The Argus
"What a jol! You gotta love the 80s!" — Cape Times
"Mike and the Harmonix show once again why they are the top cover band in South Africa… mind blowing!" — Internet Guru

*Doors open at 18h00
**Food orders will be taken until 19h45
